headline: 《痴迷》领衔今日票房，多部新片引爆暑期
headlineEn: Obsession Leads Box Office, New Films Ignite Summer
summary: 今日两部新片上映，本周共四部新片。《痴迷》和《火遮眼》霸榜，动画《海洋奇缘：启航》热度不减。
summaryEn: Two movies released today, four this week. Obsession and Fire Shade top charts; Moana: Voyage remains hot.

industryHighlights.en: Avatar: The Last Airbender film set for 2027

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》预告破纪录
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer breaks records
